items.title: US releases official agreement with Iran
items.desc: The United States on Wednesday released the official text of the memorandum of understanding reached over the weekend with Iran. A senior US administration official read out the 14-point document, which spells out provisions for reopening the Strait of Hormuz…

items.title: EU lawmakers agree approve new tougher migrant policy
items.desc: The EU is backing tougher migration policies that seek to ramp up deportations of failed asylum-seekers. Under the new legislation, EU states can establish "return hubs."

items.title: EU lawmakers approve new tougher migrant policy
items.desc: The EU is backing tougher migration policies that seek to ramp up deportations of failed asylum-seekers. Under the new legislation, EU states can establish "return hubs."

items.title: Iran to define Strait of Hormuz administration with Oman and Gulf states, senior U.S. officials say
items.desc: Senior U.S. officials disclosed the contents of the memorandum of understanding with Iran. The MOU pledges 60 days of toll-free shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Pune gets full-time defence estates officer after 10-month gap
items.desc: Pune gets full-time Defence Estates Officer as DGDE appoints Vikas Kumar, ending a 10-month vacancy that delayed decisions on defence land, leases and encroachments.

items.title: Journalists Mock South Korea's Captain, and Players Go Dark
items.desc: South Korea's national soccer team has gone quiet—with reporters, at least. Players are refusing media interviews at the World Cup after a TV broadcast accidentally aired two journalists privately mocking captain Son Heung-min's reduced military service, comm…

items.title: Missing minor traced after a year; Accused held from Nagpur district
items.desc: Chandrapur Police traced a missing minor after nearly a year under Operation Shodh-4, rescuing her in Nagpur and arresting accused Sargam Keshav Bawane.

items.title: Israeli flag confiscated at Iran World Cup game while Palestinian flags remain in stands, video shows
items.desc: Video from Monday's Iran-New Zealand World Cup game at SoFi Stadium appeared to show a man's Israeli flag confiscated while Palestinian flags remained in the stands.

items.title: Do Polymath LLMs Love Big Brother?
items.desc: In Orwell’s novel 1984, protagonist Winston is beaten down by his totalitarian state, eventually so far into submission that he honestly embraces state claims that he has strong reasons to doubt, like 2+2=5.

items.title: PMRDA told to bring structural plan in 12-18 months to unlock stalled permissions
items.desc: PMRDA ordered to implement a structural plan in 12–18 months to unblock stalled development permissions; focus on town planning schemes, ring road, twin tunnel, and encroachments.

items.title: Psychology says people who prefer staying home often have these 10 phrases in common
items.desc: Psychology suggests that people who prefer staying home often use familiar phrases that reflect their need for rest, boundaries, and emotional balance. Expressions like “I’m tired,” “let’s do it another time,” or “I’ll let you know” are not always excuses but…

items.title: USMNT’s Christian Pulisic remains day-to-day ahead of World Cup clash with Australia
items.desc: Pulisic is benefitting from a seven-day gap between matches, but his availability for Friday's match against Australia remains uncertain.

items.title: CBI raids 14 sites inbasic edu dept scam
items.desc: CBI raids 14 locations in five UP districts over alleged ₹4 crore basic education department fund embezzlement in Amethi; documents and digital devices seized.

items.title: Environmentalists protest against proposed tree felling at Tapovan
items.desc: Environmentalists protest NMC’s plan to fell 1,700 trees at Tapovan, Nashik; NGT extends interim stay on tree cutting till June 19 hearing.

items.title: NCP (SP), Cong confident their MPs won’t leave parties
items.desc: Maharashtra Congress and NCP (SP) fear BJP may target their MPs after Shiv Sena (UBT) split talk, but insist no MP or MLA will defect.

items.title: Appointed by DMK govt, retired DGPs quit posts
items.desc: Former DGPs Shankar Jiwal, Sunil Kumar and Abhay Kumar Singh resign from Tamil Nadu Fire Commission, TNUSRB and Information Commissioner posts amid changes.

items.title: Hectic prep for mid-day meal before schools reopen
items.desc: UP ramps up PM POSHAN ahead of June 25 school reopening, issuing guidelines on grain stocks, hygiene, safe water, quality checks, and kitchen gardens.
